urgent_opportunities.name: Accelerated Knowledge Transfer Partnerships 6 (AKT 6)
urgent_opportunities.eligibility: To lead a project your organisation must: be a UK registered higher education or further education institution, research and technology organisation (RTO) or Catapult collaborate with a UK registered business of any size with four or more full time employees The business must contribute a minimum of 10% to the project’s costs.
urgent_opportunities.description: UK registered academic institutions, RTOs or Catapults can apply for a share of up to £2.5 million to fund innovation projects with businesses.
urgent_opportunities.notes: IFS current sweep 2026-07-09. Route decision: Aureon can be the business problem owner, but an academic/RTO/Catapult lead is required. Next action: Use as academic partnership target. Raw closes text: 15 July 2026. IFS search result gave date only; 11:00 UK time is a tracker placeholder until the competition-specific page is checked.

urgent_opportunities.name: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Pre-deployment trials
urgent_opportunities.eligibility: This competition is open to collaborations only. To lead a collaborative project your organisation must: be a UK registered business of any size collaborate with other UK registered organisations
urgent_opportunities.description: UK registered organisations can apply for a share of up to £121 million across the three strands of this competition for innovative clean maritime technologies. This funding is from the Department for Transport (DfT).
urgent_opportunities.notes: IFS current sweep 2026-07-09. Route decision: Potential partner route for energy/simulation evidence only; maritime deployment partner required. Next action: Log partner-required route and deadline risk. Raw closes text: 15 July 2026. IFS search result gave date only; 11:00 UK time is a tracker placeholder until the competition-specific page is checked.

top_opportunities.name: Innovate UK Smart Grant
top_opportunities.description: Supports disruptive innovations with commercial potential. Quarterly rounds.
top_opportunities.notes: R&A Consulting can apply directly. Priority: Aureon AI commercialization.

top_opportunities.name: National Space Innovation Programme
top_opportunities.description: Supports innovative space technology and services.
top_opportunities.notes: Perfect fit for LSSP and EPAS. Contact innovation team.

top_opportunities.name: AIRR Compute: AI Open Access
top_opportunities.eligibility: UK registered businesses and eligible UK research organisations can apply for AIRR AI Open Access compute.
top_opportunities.description: Compute-only access to AIRR resources including Isambard-AI for AI-driven research and scientific discovery.
top_opportunities.notes: Portal draft created for proposal 0261-8797-7601-1. Final submit requires subsidy, peer-review, and company filing checks.

top_opportunities.name: Templeton Foundation Science & Big Questions
top_opportunities.description: Supports research at the intersection of science and big questions (consciousness, meaning, etc.).
top_opportunities.notes: PERFECT FIT. Your HNC framework and consciousness research are exactly what they fund.

top_opportunities.name: UKRI Future Leaders Fellowship Round 9
top_opportunities.eligibility: Must be at eligible UK research organisation. Transitioning to independence.
top_opportunities.description: Supports early career researchers transitioning to research independence. 4-year fellowship.
top_opportunities.notes: CRITICAL: Need university affiliation. Contact QUB/Ulster immediately. Stale status corrected by Aureon current sweep on 2026-07-09.

top_opportunities.name: Horizon Europe EIC Accelerator
top_opportunities.eligibility: EU-based companies. UK companies can participate (associate status).
top_opportunities.notes: Apply through Innovate UK as UK national contact point.

top_opportunities.name: NATO DIANA Accelerator
top_opportunities.description: Accelerator for deep tech with defence applications.
top_opportunities.notes: 2027 cohort. Space Solar Power is NATO priority. Prepare now.

top_opportunities.name: Schmidt Sciences / Schmidt Futures
top_opportunities.notes: Your interdisciplinary AI + physics + neuroscience is exactly what they want.

top_opportunities.name: Simons Foundation Collaboration Grants
top_opportunities.eligibility: Open. Mathematics and physical sciences focus.
top_opportunities.description: Supports mathematics, physics, and life sciences.
top_opportunities.notes: HNC harmonic mathematics and physics are strong fit.

top_opportunities.name: ARPA-E Energy Research
top_opportunities.notes: LSSP space energy and Illumination Chip. PERFECT FIT.

applications.name: AIRR Compute: AI Open Access Application
applications.notes: AIRRPortal proposal 0261-8797-7601-1 was submitted on 9 July 2026 at 6:57 AM portal time. Requested 500,000 Isambard-AI Open Access GPU hours over 365 days. Funder-ready evidence files are available in applications/funder_ready.

applications.name: QUB Honorary Research Fellow Application
applications.notes: QUB route is partner/research-affiliation outreach, not a grant submission. Use only as a partner-development route.

applications.name: Aureon Evidence Studio for Createch AI Workflows
applications.notes: Portal application 10209601 was submitted through the Innovation Funding Service on 7 July 2026 at 1:47pm. Monitor assessment and feedback; reopening is reserved for a deliberate resubmission decision. Total eligible cost is GBP250,000 with grant request GBP175,000 and company contribution GBP75,000.

applications.name: Aureon Evidence Studio - EIC Accelerator Step 1 Draft
applications.notes: EIC Step 1 pack exists as a preparation route. Customer discovery notes, LOIs or pilot interest, competitor map, prototype or demo evidence, FTO/IP note, finance plan, and privacy policy are required before external submission.

applications.name: Aureon AI Evidence OS - Future Leaders Fellowship Round 11 Pack
applications.notes: IFS application 10209992 was submitted through the Innovation Funding Service. Portal status page shows Application submitted for Future Leaders Fellowships: Round 11, business and non-academic, submitted on 9 Jul 2026 at 11:07am. Track URL: https://apply-for-innovation-funding.service.gov.uk/application/10209992/track. Submitted finance: total eligible costs GBP250,000, funding level 70.00%, funding sought GBP175,000, company contribution GBP75,000, other public sector funding GBP0. Monitor the IFS track page and gaxlec@gmail.com for eligibility checks, assessment updates, and funder correspondence.

applications.name: Aureon Evidence Studio - Innovation Loans EOI
applications.notes: Innovation Loans is a loan route rather than grant funding. Submission requires repayment, cashflow, subsidy, finance-risk, and director approval records.

applications.name: Aureon Energy Flexibility Evidence and Assurance Scope
applications.funder: Innovate UK / UKRI R&D Missions Accelerator
applications.notes: Potential grant route when scoped with consumer-energy flexibility partner or customer evidence. Energy-domain partner/customer evidence and project scope are required before a standalone application.

applications.name: Aureon International Evidence Automation Collaboration Abstract
applications.notes: Collaboration-only route requiring at least one Swiss implementation partner under the equivalent Innosuisse programme.

applications.name: Aureon Responsible AI Evidence Tooling for Earlier SEN Identification
applications.notes: Requires education/SEN partner, ethics framing, procurement fit, and evidence that tooling supports professional judgement without replacing it.

applications.name: Aureon Scientific Compute Governance for Quantum Hardware Partner Route
applications.notes: Requires a quantum hardware lead partner. Aureon can be positioned as software, runtime, and evidence-assurance support.

applications.name: Aureon Eurostars International R&D Collaboration Route
applications.notes: Stage only. Build a cross-border SME/research partner shortlist, confirm UK national funding body rules, then prepare a Eurostars consortium abstract. No portal submission without partner confirmation.

applications.name: Aureon CHERI IKC Academic Partner Evidence Route
applications.notes: Not directly eligible as lead. Stage a partner note for QUB/Ulster/EPSRC-eligible host discussions.

incremental_monitor.submission_guard: Submitted IFS/AIRR records preserved; no provider login, CAPTCHA, MFA, or final submission attempted in this incremental run.
